title: Miner's Moon
description: This Add-on for Enhanced Celestials adds a Miner's Moon
body:
![Miner's Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a56b609b8ba7bb0a5540546bda6a24e3b64ca4a.png)
The Miner's Moon mod adds a new moon to Enhanced Celestials, increasing ore, gem and dust drops while mining.

To add modded materials without the proper tags to the increased drops, add them to a #forge:miners_moon_ores tag in your modpack's datapack.

All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
